title: Covellia oppositifolia
intro: Covellia oppositifolia, also known as Yellow Stems, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Covellia oppositifolia include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Covellia oppositifolia is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, as well as being used to make teas and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
